description: Byte-preserve happy path — claude-cli/* UA + streaming body classifies as CLAUDE_CODE_TUI via the body-hint disambiguation (stream:true implies TUI). No cache_control. Exercises the core byte-preserve emission shape.

test_env_preconditions.reason: Classifier's _claude_code_mode parses explicit entrypoint values cron/cli/sdk/ide/tmux from header OR env; 'tui' is not in that list and instead defaults via body-hint (stream:true → TUI). If the runner's CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT env is set to any of the recognized values, it overrides the body hint. SC-06 fixtures must scrub this env var before running TUI scenarios.
